## Description

<!-- Describe what this PR does and why. Include relevant context. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an `x`. -->

- [ ] `feat` -- New feature
- [ ] `fix` -- Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` -- Code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] `docs` -- Documentation update
- [ ] `test` -- Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` -- Maintenance, tooling, or build changes

## Checklist

<!-- All items must be checked before merging. -->

- [ ] No use of `any`, `@ts-ignore`, or `eslint-disable` to bypass type rules
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes with no errors or warnings
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes with no errors
- [ ] `bun run test` passes with no failures
- [ ] i18n updated for all 3 locales (pt-BR, en, es) -- if UI text changed
- [ ] Changes documented in AGENTS.md version table -- if applicable

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues. E.g., Closes #123 -->
